summary: Iteration 20 - base_y P0 Bug Fix and Video Duration Matching. All 16 backend tests passed. Code review verified both fixes: (1) Backend: base_y = txt_y is now explicitly set at line 2873 before the hook_timings loop, fixing the 'base_y is not defined' NameError during assembly with videos. (2) Frontend: prepareLibraryClips in Step6AssembleVideo.js now separates images/videos and implements smart video duration matching - videos are trimmed proportionally when total > audio, or repeated to fill when total < audio.
passed_tests: Backend: Login works with test@example.com / test123456
Backend: base_y = txt_y is set before hook_timings loop (line 2873)
Backend: base_y is used in drawtext y_expr calculations
Backend: Multiline text wrapping with MAX_CHARS_PER_LINE=28 exists
Backend: Font reduction to 70% for 4+ lines exists
Frontend: prepareLibraryClips separates imageItems and videoItems
Frontend: videoRepeatPlan logic exists for video duration matching
Frontend: Videos trimmed proportionally when totalVideoDuration >= audioDurForVideos
Frontend: Videos repeated to fill when totalVideoDuration < audioDurForVideos
Frontend: trim-video API called with maxDuration parameter
Backend: All animation types supported (none, fade, slide_up, slide_down, pop, bounce)
Backend: Each line gets individual drawtext with y offset calculation
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Bug Fix VERIFIED: base_y = txt_y is now set at line 2873 before the for loop at line 2874. This was the missing variable causing 'NameError: name base_y is not defined' during video assembly.

Video Duration Matching VERIFIED: Frontend prepareLibraryClips (lines 93-182) correctly implements: (1) Image/video separation, (2) audioDurForVideos = climaxDuration - totalImageDuration, (3) Proportional trim when videos > audio (ratio = audioDurForVideos/totalVideoDuration), (4) Repeat loop when videos < audio (while filled < audioDurForVideos)
Code quality: Both fixes are clean and follow existing patterns. No regressions detected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified two critical fixes: (1) base_y P0 bug fix - the variable is now set before the hook_timings loop at line 2873 in server.py, (2) Video duration matching in Step6AssembleVideo.js - prepareLibraryClips now handles video/image separation and smart duration matching. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend loads correctly. Note: Test project 69d1609e3dbd882c6ec76c2a mentioned in the request no longer exists, but the code fixes have been verified through static analysis and API endpoint testing.

verified_features.p0_base_y_fix: VERIFIED - base_y = txt_y set at line 2873 before hook_timings loop at line 2874
verified_features.multiline_text_wrapping: VERIFIED - MAX_CHARS_PER_LINE=28, word-wrap into lines[], each line gets individual drawtext
verified_features.video_duration_matching_trim: VERIFIED - When totalVideoDuration >= audioDurForVideos, ratio = audioDurForVideos/totalVideoDuration applied
verified_features.video_duration_matching_repeat: VERIFIED - When totalVideoDuration < audioDurForVideos, videos repeated in while loop until filled
